mnemonics: Ongoing Vigilance Is Paramount (OVIP) - A reminder that Continuous Internal Evaluation requires constant oversight and is a Vital, Integral Process.
keyPoints: It is a proactive, ongoing process, not a one-time audit.
It focuses on identifying and mitigating risks in real-time to protect data.
It involves regularly testing and assessing the effectiveness of security controls and policies.
commonMistakes: Treating it as a periodic, scheduled event rather than a continuous activity.
Focusing only on technical controls and neglecting employee behavior and process weaknesses.
Failing to document findings and track the remediation of identified vulnerabilities over time.
